subject: Register vfc with pod ip when deploy it
commit_message:
Register vfc with pod ip when deploy it

Change-Id: I2ab37160c0c73caaaf533d0851070a96d341c1df
Issue-ID: OOM-1012
Signed-off-by: LiZi <li.zi30@zte.com.cn>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Intermittent success on startup. Many pods fail and restart a number of times.
This is on a multi-node cluster. On a single node, they seem to come up but health check passes intermittently as well.
I spoke with Mahendra, and he will reach out to Yan to work through these issues.

Patch Set 1:

I have no permission to abandon this, only Lizi can do this.
Because vfc chart have deployed successfully. I'm not sure whether this commit can work or not. Lizi currently can not participate the community aciton due to zte company limitation.

Abandoned
